title: Horimiya
sourceNotes: Single-cour 2021 TV anime (13 eps). The adaptation is heavily abridged — it cherry-picks chapters out of order to compress the whole romance into 13 episodes, skipping large stretches of the 152-chapter (complete) manga. Episode→chapter ranges below are approximate and consolidated from a per-episode guide; the anime threads through roughly chapters 1–122 with many gaps. The skipped material was later adapted as "Horimiya: The Missing Pieces" (2023). Last entry extends to the final chapter 152 to cover the manga in full.
